'''losasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kurtotic|kurtotic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kurtotic|kurtotic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| losasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:losasithi|losasithi]] || [[word:losasiji|losasiji]] || [[word:losasishi|losasishi]] || [[word:losasiki|losasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:losasuthuthu|losasuthuthu]] || [[word:losasujuju|losasujuju]] || [[word:losasushushu|losasushushu]] || [[word:losasukuku|losasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:losasuthu|losasuthu]] || [[word:losasuju|losasuju]] || [[word:losasushu|losasushu]] || [[word:losasuku|losasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:losasufthuf|losasufthuf]] || [[word:losasufjuf|losasufjuf]] || [[word:losasufshuf|losasufshuf]] || [[word:losasufkuf|losasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:losasethe|losasethe]] || [[word:losaseje|losaseje]] || [[word:losaseshe|losaseshe]] || [[word:losaseke|losaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:losasothotho|losasothotho]] || [[word:losasojojo|losasojojo]] || [[word:losasoshosho|losasoshosho]] || [[word:losasokoko|losasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:losasotho|losasotho]] || [[word:losasojo|losasojo]] || [[word:losasosho|losasosho]] || [[word:losasoko|losasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:losasofthof|losasofthof]] || [[word:losasofjof|losasofjof]] || [[word:losasofshof|losasofshof]] || [[word:losasofkof|losasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:losasĂŻfthĂŻf|losasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfjĂŻf|losasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfshĂŻf|losasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfkĂŻf|losasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:losasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|losasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|losasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|losasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|losasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:losasĂŻfthĂŻf|losasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfjĂŻf|losasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfshĂŻf|losasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfkĂŻf|losasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:losasĂŻfthĂŻf|losasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfjĂŻf|losasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfshĂŻf|losasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:losasĂŻfkĂŻf|losasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:losasĂŠthĂŠ|losasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:losasĂŠjĂŠ|losasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:losasĂŠshĂŠ|losasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:losasĂŠkĂŠ|losasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:losasathatha|losasathatha]] || [[word:losasajaja|losasajaja]] || [[word:losasashasha|losasashasha]] || [[word:losasakaka|losasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:losasatha|losasatha]] || [[word:losasaja|losasaja]] || [[word:losasasha|losasasha]] || [[word:losasaka|losasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:losasafthaf|losasafthaf]] || [[word:losasafjaf|losasafjaf]] || [[word:losasafshaf|losasafshaf]] || [[word:losasafkaf|losasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:losasasha|losasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:losasshĂ«asha|losasshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:losasroasha|losasroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:losasmuasha|losasmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:losasyaasha|losasyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golosasnkshĂ«asha|golosasnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golosasnkroasha|golosasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golosasnkmuasha|golosasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golosasnkyaasha|golosasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:losasasasha|losasasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:losasasshĂ«asha|losasasshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:losasasroasha|losasasroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:losasasmuasha|losasasmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:losasasyaasha|losasasyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golosasasnkshĂ«asha|golosasasnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golosasasnkroasha|golosasasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golosasasnkmuasha|golosasasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golosasasnkyaasha|golosasasnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lesĂŠsasha|lesĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lesĂŠsshĂ«asha|lesĂŠsshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lesĂŠsroasha|lesĂŠsroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lesĂŠsmuasha|lesĂŠsmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lesĂŠsyaasha|lesĂŠsyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golesĂŠsnkshĂ«asha|golesĂŠsnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golesĂŠsnkroasha|golesĂŠsnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golesĂŠsnkmuasha|golesĂŠsnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golesĂŠsnkyaasha|golesĂŠsnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:losfasasha|losfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:losfasshĂ«asha|losfasshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:losfasroasha|losfasroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:losfasmuasha|losfasmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:losfasyaasha|losfasyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golosfasnkshĂ«asha|golosfasnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golosfasnkroasha|golosfasnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golosfasnkmuasha|golosfasnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golosfasnkyaasha|golosfasnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
